content: You're very unlikely to clear arc2ch4, so enjoy the story for now
For story mode. Analysis of death is used to refill your aliens for exalt. It's not really used for the crit stats
Specifically for arc1
Otherwise for d tide and arc2, you can use lilly or Mouchette wheel
No, some give more than others. If you want to farm standard pulls, do arc1 awakener trials first
is it possible to do this............... lmao

Yes. Theres 2 ways.

1 story mode: run these wheels
Specifically the one that looks like a wheat
It gives you 1k skey after battle
Just go to a random stage and grind it out

spam the OE forever

hi, I've just started dipping my toes into d-dive, and I'm just curious if my goal is to get 300 points (eventually) is it usually recommended to build a few teams super strong to challenge the highest level, or to build more teams just enough to do the lowest level?
alright thanks for the help

a realistic goal to get is 350, this is equivalent to 5 alert 3 clears. alert 3 is doable with any reasonable level 60 team

you are allowed one support so you can just bring a gmurphy or mouchette and do alert 5 for one wave

there are a few strategies, personally i think its good to have something like 6-8 teams in your pocket and rotate whichever ones are best matchup for the boss

personally, i use my leveled story carry to beat the highest difficulty on one wave, 1 support to beat another wave, then figure out the combination of clears on the other waves that gets me the most points

I found the receipts

Source is <@88644018673582080> 

TL;DR: Lily wheel gains more value the lower your critrate and the shorter your rotation. Because Lily wheel provides a flat critrate/critdamage buff, the lower your crit stats, the higher the effect will be. In comparison, Mouche sig wheel provides a ramping damage buff, and therefore the longer your rotation the higher the effect will be

The breakpoint that is most relevant to standard players (in my opinion) is ~80% critrate. Once you exceed this critrate, Lily wheel will be worse than her sig for standard burst rotations involving shining/mortal/shining. In DTide with more limited support and crit options, this changes to ~90% critrate

Assuming you are able to reach 100% critrate without the assistance of Lily wheel, you will see approximately ~10-20% damage increase via using her sig wheel instead (depending on how long your burst rotation is)
Caveat of course is that mouchette currently does so much damage that she actually overkills most bosses

dumb question, but if I am understanding this effect it's about to use. Is this just flat out the phase transition?
yes
the boss will phase either by reaching the last hp bar or by reaching a set turn count
it gains a flat amount of hp bars with the phase transition so it's preferred to phase via last hp bar if possible as every hp bar after the transition has considerably more hp than in phase 1
